privacyTitle: Your case files stay on this device
privacyBody: To work privately, the app downloads a Private AI Pack after setup.
This Private AI Pack lets the app summarize, search, and draft from case files without uploading them.
Model downloads, entitlement checks, and optional public-law searches stay separate from your case files.
privateAIIntroTitle: Private AI works locally after setup
privateAIIntroBody: Private Digital Clerk works locally. To do that, it downloads a Private AI Pack after setup. This is what lets the app read and summarize case files without uploading them.
downloadConsentBody: This is the private AI brain of the app. It stays on your phone and lets the app read case files without uploading them.
instantModeBanner: Instant Mode is on. You can capture documents, organize cases, and run basic summaries. Larger case analysis will be available after the Private AI Pack is ready.
notFoundCopy: Not found in the case file
